title: Intense Peppery Mediterranean Beef Stew
description: A molten, pepper‑laden beef stew that satisfies midnight cravings with Mediterranean flair and low‑glycemic ingredients.
instructions: Heat bamboo tray over medium heat and add olive oil until shimmering.
Add beef cubes and brown on all sides in batches, then remove and set aside.
In the same tray, sauté onion until translucent, then add garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Stir in bell peppers and tomatoes, cooking until they soften slightly, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle smoked paprika, cumin, cayenne pepper and black pepper over the vegetables and stir to coat.
Return browned beef to the tray, pour in beef stock, and add lemon juice; stir well.
Cover the tray with a tight‑fitting lid and place in a pressure cooker set to high pressure for 35 minutes.
Release pressure naturally for 10 minutes, then quick‑release any remaining pressure.
Remove the lid, stir the stew, and let it simmer for 5 minutes to reduce slightly.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
